body_preview:
Dear team,

This is a reminder that mid-year performance reviews open on Monday. Please complete your self-assessment on the HR portal before your scheduled session.

Regards,
Lerato Pillay
Head of Human Resources
subject: HR notice: Mid-year performance reviews open Monday

body_preview:
Hi Lerato,

Thanks for the reminder. I have completed my self-assessment and booked my session with Nomsa for Thursday afternoon.

Best,
Asha
subject: Re: HR notice: Mid-year performance reviews open Monday

body_preview:
Dear all,

Kgosi Media offices in Braamfontein will run on a public holiday schedule for Youth Day on 16 June. Rhythm FM broadcasts continue as normal with the holiday presenter roster.

Regards,
Fatima Patel
Office Administrator
subject: Group memo: Youth Day office schedule, 16 June

body_preview:
Team,

New leave applications must now go through the updated HR portal workflow. Paper forms will no longer be accepted from 1 July. A short how-to guide is attached.

Thanks,
Priya Govender
Payroll and Benefits
subject: HR notice: New leave application workflow from 1 July

body_preview:
Hi Asha,

Production meeting moved to 14:00 on Wednesday in Studio 2 to fit around the documentary planning. Agenda is the 30th anniversary series and next week's guest line-up.

Sipho
subject: Production meeting moved to Wednesday 14:00, Studio 2

body_preview:
Dear colleagues,

The annual staff wellness day will be held at Zoo Lake on Friday 26 June. Please register your attendance and any dietary requirements with HR by 20 June.

Regards,
Sibongile Ndlovu
Learning and Development
subject: Group memo: Staff wellness day, 26 June at Zoo Lake

body_preview:
Hi all,

IT will be rolling out two-factor authentication on all Kgosi Media accounts next week. You will be prompted to enrol on your next login. Reach out to the IT desk if you hit any issues.

Themba Nkosi
IT Support Manager
subject: IT notice: Two-factor authentication rollout next week

body_preview:
Hi Themba,

Thanks for the heads-up. I present on the MacBook Air, so could you confirm the authenticator app works for me before the morning show window?

Best,
Asha
subject: Re: IT notice: Two-factor authentication rollout next week

body_preview:
Dear team,

Payslips for June are now available on the HR portal. Please check that your banking details are current, as the August salary run will use the details on file.

Regards,
Priya Govender
Payroll and Benefits
subject: HR notice: June payslips available on the portal

body_preview:
Hi Asha,

Can you join a short call on Monday about your contract renewal and the additional documentary hours? Nomsa and I would like to align before sign-off.

Regards,
Lerato Pillay
Head of Human Resources
subject: Contract renewal and documentary hours - quick call Monday

body_preview:
Colleagues,

The Studio 1 air conditioning will be serviced on Saturday morning. Facilities will be on site from 07:00; please log any further faults via the IT and facilities desk.

Tshepo Mokwena
Facilities Manager
subject: Facilities notice: Studio 1 aircon service Saturday

body_preview:
Hi Asha,

Please send your sponsor read scripts for the next flight by Thursday so I can clear them with the sales team before they go to air.

Thanks,
Refilwe Sithole
Sales and Sponsorship
subject: Sponsor read scripts needed by Thursday

body_preview:
All staff,

A reminder that the Kgosi Media code of conduct and social media policy have been updated. Please read the new version on the portal and acknowledge it by 30 June.

Regards,
Lerato Pillay
Head of Human Resources
subject: HR notice: Updated code of conduct and social media policy

body_preview:
Hi team,

The quarterly programming review is set for 23 June at 10:00 in the Braamfontein boardroom. Each presenter should bring listenership figures and proposed format changes.

Nandi Dlamini
Programming Director
subject: Group memo: Quarterly programming review, 23 June

body_preview:
Hi Asha,

Welcome note for the new interns starting Monday in the newsroom. Karabo will run their induction; please make time to say hello during your studio handover.

Regards,
Zinhle Motha
Marketing and Communications
subject: Group memo: New newsroom interns start Monday

body_preview:
Hi Asha,

Health and safety drill scheduled for Thursday at 11:00. Studios will use the recorded fallback during the evacuation. Please brief any guests in the building.

Johan van der Merwe
Health and Safety Officer
subject: Health and safety notice: Evacuation drill Thursday 11:00
